subject: Block 08:xx UTC sniper bets
body: z=-4.30, p<0.0001. Statistically undeniable. Add 8 to sniper_blocked_hours.

subject: Block NO-side at 00:xx UTC
body: z=-3.26, p<0.001, n=21, -$61.85 impact. Asian session buying pressure.

subject: Volatility filter (replaces time-based blocking)
body: Skip bet when 5-min price change >1%. Needs vol_5min_pct logging first.

subject: Le (2026) recalibration formula
body: 292M trades, domain-specific FLB coefficients. Politics b=1.83 (13pp edge at 70c).

subject: Adopt drawdown heat system
body: 4 levels: Normal/Warning/Critical/Kill. Track peak equity high water mark.

subject: Start logging vol_5min_pct, spread_cents, concurrent_positions
body: Missing features for meta-classifier. At n=100, run preliminary importance.

subject: Wire queue_injector.py as UserPromptSubmit hook
body: Add to polymarket-bot .claude/settings.local.json UserPromptSubmit hooks: python3 /Users/matthewshields/Projects/ClaudeCodeAdvancements/queue_injector.py. Set env CCA_CHAT_ID=km. This injects unread cross-chat messages as context on every prompt.

subject: Wire queue_injector.py as UserPromptSubmit hook
body: Add to polymarket-bot .claude/settings.local.json UserPromptSubmit hooks: python3 /Users/matthewshields/Projects/ClaudeCodeAdvancements/queue_injector.py. Set env CCA_CHAT_ID=kr. This injects unread cross-chat messages as context on every prompt.

subject: MT-0 Phase 2: Your mission this session
body:
Read /Users/matthewshields/Projects/ClaudeCodeAdvancements/KALSHI_MT0_TASK_BRIEF.md FIRST. It has your full task brief.

Summary: Build self-learning integration into the Kalshi bot. TDD. 4 tasks:
1. trading_journal.py — log every bet outcome to JSONL
2. research_tracker.py — track which CCA research items led to profitable changes
3. Return channel — send outcomes back to CCA via cross_chat_queue.py
4. Pattern summary at wrap — analyze journal for win rate patterns

Start bot in background first: source venv/bin/activate && python main.py --live > /tmp/polybot_s120.log 2>&1 &

Report progress to CCA: python3 /Users/matthewshields/Projects/ClaudeCodeAdvancements/cross_chat_queue.py send --from km --to cca --priority medium --category status_update --subject 'progress' --body 'description'

Check for CCA guidance: python3 /Users/matthewshields/Projects/ClaudeCodeAdvancements/cross_chat_queue.py unread --for km

subject: SETTINGS UPDATE: Added UserPromptSubmit hook to your settings.local.json. CCA queue_hook.py will now inject cross-chat messages as additionalContext when you start a prompt. Change authorized by Matthew (S118).
